0.highlight: soluciones digitales que generan impacto real en tu negocio
0.description: De la concepción al deploy, nuestro equipo de más de 60 agentes especializados construye software, diseño, contenido y blockchain. Validamos tu proyecto antes de la inversión para evitar retrabajo.

1.headline: Blockchain no es solo criptomoneda.
1.highlight: Es un nuevo paradigma de confianza digital
1.description: De la tokenización de activos al DeFi, creamos soluciones descentralizadas completas con seguridad, auditoría y compliance. Más de 10 expertos Web3 listos para sacar tu proyecto del papel y llevarlo al mercado.

2.headline: Antes de invertir mucho,
2.highlight: invierte en la validación de tu idea
2.description: El Radar Dibs analiza tu proyecto desde 4 perspectivas — UX, Técnica, Mercado y Económica — con score Go/No-Go. Más del 70% de los proyectos fracasan por no contar con una validación previa adecuada.

3.headline: Uma equipe com 60+ especialistas
3.highlight:
tudo por um investimento
sob medida
3.description: Diseño, desarrollo, contenido, blockchain y seguridad reunidos en un solo lugar. Metodología ágil, entregas quincenales y 100% de los proyectos concluidos dentro del plazo estipulado.

0.title: E-Book — Experiencia del Hogar

1.title: Landing Page Experiencia del Hogar
1.description: El cliente necesitaba una identidad visual que transmitiera artesanía y calidez. Creamos un Design System completo de Figma a Next.js. Resultado: presencia digital cohesiva en todas las pantallas.

2.title: Game Snake Bonus
2.description: Necesitábamos una herramienta de engagement para mantener usuarios activos. Desarrollamos un juego con 5 fases, power-ups y ranking competitivo. Resultado: cientos de jugadores comprometidos.

3.title: TimeTracker Pro
3.description: El equipo perdía horas sin rastrear costos por proyecto. Creamos una plataforma interna de gestión de tiempo con cálculo automático de costos. Resultado: reducción significativa en sobrepresupuesto.

4.title: GestCash
4.description: Inversores sin visibilidad unificada de sus activos y proyectos. Desarrollamos un sistema completo con tokenización, smart contract y perfiles multinivel. Resultado: primera plataforma del segmento con gestión integrada.

5.title: Top 5 Traders
5.description: Plataforma completa de señales de trading con dashboard, EA MetaTrader, bot Telegram y sistema de suscripciones. +2.300 miembros y 73% de tasa de acierto.

cta.title: ¿Construimos algo increíble juntos?

pageTitle.label: Portafolio
pageTitle.title: Proyectos que transformaron ideas en resultados
pageTitle.subtitle: Cada case representa una asociación real con clientes que confiaron en Dibs para sacar sus ideas del papel.

0.title: E-Book — Experiencia del Hogar
0.description: E-book completo desde cero: investigación de mercado, escritura creativa, diseño editorial, diagramación profesional y publicación en Amazon KDP. Proyecto entregado en 15 días con ventas ya en la primera semana.

1.title: Landing Page Experiencia del Hogar
1.description: El cliente necesitaba una identidad visual que comunicara artesanía, calidez y calidad artesanal. Creamos un Design System exclusivo con prototipado en Figma, desarrollo frontend con Next.js y Tailwind, y naming alineado con la esencia de la marca. Resultado: presencia digital cohesiva con identidad visual que convierte visitantes en clientes.

2.title: Game Snake Bonus
2.description: El desafío era crear una herramienta de engagement para mantener usuarios activos en el ecosistema de la plataforma. Desarrollamos un juego interactivo con 5 fases temáticas (Bosque, Desierto, Espacio, Ciudad, Castillo), power-ups especiales, sistema de 3 vidas y ranking de puntuación. Resultado: cientos de jugadores comprometidos con experiencia mobile-first y mecánicas progresivas.

3.title: TimeTracker Pro
3.description: El equipo perdía horas de trabajo sin poder rastrear costos por proyecto y etapa, generando sobrepresupuestos recurrentes. Creamos una plataforma interna de gestión de tiempo con seguimiento por proyecto y etapa, cálculo automático de costos, simulación de presupuestos e inteligencia de precios. Resultado: reducción significativa de sobrepresupuesto y previsibilidad financiera.

4.title: GestCash
4.description: Inversores e idealizadores de proyectos no tenían visibilidad unificada de los activos, dificultando la gestión y el seguimiento de resultados. Desarrollamos un sistema completo de gestión de inversiones con perfiles multinivel (inversor, idealizador, administrador), tokenización de proyectos, contrato inteligente y dashboard financiero. Resultado: la primera plataforma del segmento en integrar tokenización con gestión financiera multi-perfil.

5.title: Top 5 Traders
5.description: Plataforma completa de señales de trading multi-mercado (Forex, Crypto, Binarias) con dashboard en tiempo real, EA propio Top5 Trend Engine v4, bot de señales por Telegram y sistema de suscripciones recurrentes con 3 planes.

testimonial.text: Dibs Solutions transformó nuestra presencia digital. Entregaron un e-book completo en 15 días y el resultado superó nuestras expectativas. Profesionalismo y calidad excepcionales.
testimonial.author: Débora Mendonça

pageTitle.label: Sobre Nosotros
pageTitle.title: A Dibs Solutions
pageTitle.subtitle: Una agencia de tecnología donde humanos e IA trabajan en orquestación para entregar resultados extraordinarios.

modelo.title: O Modelo Dibs
modelo.p1: Dibs Solutions opera en el modelo hub-and-spoke: un orquestrador central (Elias) coordina agentes especialistas distribuidos en 8 departamentos. Cada demanda es enrutada al agente correcto, en el momento correcto, con la supervisión humana correcta.
modelo.p2: Eso significa que no contrata a un profesional — contrata un equipo completo: arquitecto, desarrolladores, diseñadores, revisores, testers y DevOps, todos trabajando en sincronía.

0.title: Fundación
0.text: Rafael Mendonça funda Dibs Solutions con la visión de crear una agencia de tecnología donde agentes de IA especializados trabajan en orquestación con humanos. El modelo hub-and-spoke nace aquí.

1.title: Primeiros Projetos
1.text: La agencia entrega sus primeros proyectos: plataformas web, contenido editorial y consultoría técnica. El modelo de agentes IA prueba su eficacia en la práctica.

2.title: Expansión
2.text: Crecimiento a 8 departamentos especializados. Blockchain, Automatizaciones Financieras y el Radar Dibs son lanzados. El equipo llega a 60+ agentes.

3.title: Consolidación
3.text: Dibs Solutions se consolida como referente en desarrollo de software, diseño, contenido y blockchain. Más de 40 proyectos entregados con 100% de conclusión.

0.title: Parceria Real
0.desc: No somos proveedores de servicio — somos socios. Cada proyecto es tratado como si fuera nuestro.

1.title: Inteligencia Colectiva
1.desc: Combinamos lo mejor de la inteligencia humana con IA especializada para entregar resultados que ninguno de los dos alcanzaría por sí solo.

2.title: Transparencia Total
2.desc: Procesos abiertos, comunicación clara y entregas predecibles. Sin caja negra, sin sorpresas.

3.title: Excelencia Medible
3.desc: 99.5% de uptime, 4.9 de satisfacción, 100% de proyectos concluidos. Nuestros números hablan por sí solos.

3.label: Nota de satisfacción de los clientes

cta.text: Conozca a los profesionales que hacen todo esto posible.

pageTitle.label: Servicios
pageTitle.title: Soluciones completas para su negocio digital
pageTitle.subtitle: 8 áreas de actuación con líderes especializados y squads dedicadas. Haga clic en cada servicio para detalles completos.

0.title: Software Development
0.description: Sistemas web, APIs REST/GraphQL, SaaS multi-tenant. Arquitectura escalable con Next.js, React, Node.js, Python, Go, Java, .NET y PHP Laravel. Squads ágiles montados bajo demanda con entregas quincenales.

1.title: Design & UI/UX
1.description: Design System completo con Storybook, prototipado navegable en Figma, UX Writing estratégico con microcopy orientado a conversión, y validación de accesibilidad WCAG AA desde el wireframe.

2.title: Contenido & Publicación
2.description: E-books institucionales, blogs técnicos, copywriting de ventas, ghostwriting, traducción y localización (PT/EN/FR/ES), y publicación completa en Amazon KDP con optimización SEO.

3.title: Blockchain & Web3
3.description: Smart contracts en Solidity y Rust, protocolos DeFi, tokenización de activos reales (RWA), DAOs con gobernanza descentralizada, y auditoría de seguridad on-chain completa.

4.title: Automatizaciones Financieras
4.description: Bots de trading automatizados para cripto y B3, dashboards de compliance en tiempo real, análisis de riesgo algorítmico e integración con sistemas heredados del mercado financiero.

5.title: Radar Dibs
5.description: Validación de proyectos en 4 fases: UX (jornada del usuario), Técnica (arquitectura), Mercado (viabilidad) y Económica (ROI). Score 0-10 con recomendación Go/No-Go e informe ejecutivo.

6.title: Auditoría & Seguridad
6.description: ARSA (Análisis Rápido de Superficie de Ataque), code review orientado a seguridad, pruebas de penetración, conformidad LGPD/GDPR, y política de seguridad de la información.

7.title: Consultoria
7.description: Gestión de alcance y cambios, revisión de arquitectura de sistemas, roadmaps estratégicos, definición de metodologías, y memoria organizacional para continuidad de proyectos.

0.title: Software Development
0.description: Sistemas web, APIs e SaaS sob medida. Next.js, React, Node.js, Python, Go, Java, .NET.

1.title: Design & UI/UX
1.description: Design System, Storybook, prototipado, UX Writing y accesibilidad WCAG AA.

2.title: Contenido & Publicación
2.description: E-books, blogs, copywriting, traducción y publicación en Amazon KDP.

3.title: Blockchain & Web3
3.description: Smart contracts, DeFi, RWA, DAOs e auditoria on-chain.

4.title: Automatizaciones Financieras
4.description: Bots de trading, integración B3, compliance y riesgo en tiempo real.

5.title: Radar Dibs

hero.title: Software
hero.description: Arquitectamos y desarrollamos sistemas web, APIs y SaaS a medida. Squads multidisciplinarias montadas para cada proyecto, del concepto al deploy continuo.

0.solution: Sistemas que se traban conforme el crecimiento de usuarios y datos. Reescritura cara y arriesgada.

1.solution: Dependencias desactualizadas, deuda técnica acumulada, dificultad para contratar quien toque el código.

2.solution: Infraestructura mal dimensionada, retrabajo constante y ausencia de automatización en los procesos.

3.solution: Sprints largos, deploy manual y procesos burocráticos que retrasan el lanzamiento de funcionalidades.

4.solution: Mercado caliente, salarios altos y perfiles escasos. Montar y mantener un equipo de tecnología es caro y lento.

roadmap.title: O que entregamos
roadmap.subtitle: Entregamos software completo, del frontend a la infraestructura. Cada proyecto cuenta con un arquitecto dedicado.

0.title: Frontend
0.description: SPA, SSR, ISR. Next.js, React, Tailwind. Interfaces rápidas, responsivas y accesibles.

1.title: Backend
1.description: APIs REST y GraphQL. Node.js, Python, Go, Java, .NET, PHP. Escalables, seguras y bien documentadas.

2.title: Mobile
2.description: React Native y Flutter. Android e iOS con una base de código y actualizaciones simultáneas.

3.title: APIs & Integraciones
3.description: Conectamos ERPs, gateways de pago, CRMs y servicios de terceros sin interrumpir operaciones.

4.title: Banco de Dados
4.description: Modelado relacional y NoSQL. Migrations, optimización de queries y replicación.

5.title: DevOps & Infra
5.description: CI/CD, Docker, cloud (AWS, Vercel, VPS). Monitoramento 24/7 com 99.5% de uptime garantido.

0.title: Descoberta
0.description: Entendemos el negocio, mapeamos flujos y definimos requisitos técnicos junto con usted.

1.title: Arquitetura
1.description: Diseñamos la estructura del sistema, elegimos el stack y definimos estándares de código.

2.title: Desenvolvimento
2.description: Sprints quincenales con entregas incrementales. Usted acompaña el progreso en tiempo real.

3.title: Deploy & Suporte
3.description: Publicación con CI/CD, monitoreo activo y soporte continuo post-lanzamiento.

cta.title: Have a project in mind?
cta.description: Tell us your idea. Within 24 hours you'll receive an analysis with technical recommendations and estimated timeline and cost.

hero.title: Blockchain &
hero.description: Decentralized solutions from concept to deployment — with security, auditing and governance. Over 10 dedicated specialists.

0.solution: Centralized processes that depend on intermediaries. Your business vulnerable to failures and fraud.

1.solution: High fees on gateways, notaries and trusted third parties. Blockchain eliminates most of these costs.

2.solution: International transfers that take days. Smart contracts settle in seconds, 24/7.

3.solution: Opaque records auditable only by a few. Blockchain offers complete and immutable traceability.

4.solution: Hiring specialists in Solidity, Rust, DeFi and auditing is expensive and scarce. Your ready team exists.

roadmap.title: What we deliver
roadmap.subtitle: Complete decentralized solutions, from smart contract to DApp. All audited and documented.

0.title: Smart Contracts
0.description: Solidity (EVM) and Rust (Solana). Audited code, gas-optimized and with exhaustive testing.

1.title: DeFi
1.description: Lending protocols, staking, farming, DEXs and yield aggregators with security and efficiency.

2.title: RWA Tokenization
2.description: We transform real-world assets (real estate, receivables, artworks) into tradable tokens on the blockchain.

3.title: DAOs
3.description: Decentralized governance with on-chain voting, multi-sig treasury and automated proposals.

4.title: NFTs
4.description: Collections, marketplaces and utility beyond art. Tokens with real value for your business.

5.title: Auditing
5.description: Complete smart contract review: reentrancy, overflow, access control and 20+ vectors.

0.title: Discovery
0.description: We understand the business problem and determine if blockchain is the best solution — it's not always.

1.title: Architecture
1.description: Chain selection, contract design, token and governance definition.

2.title: Development
2.description: Smart contract implementation with unit tests and continuous integration.

3.title: Audit & Deploy
3.description: Internal + external audit. Monitored deployment with planned fallback and rollback.

cta.title: Ready to decentralize?
cta.description: Tell us about your Web3 project. Within 48 hours we'll deliver a technical feasibility analysis with estimate.

hero.title: Design &
hero.description: We create complete digital experiences, from wireframe to final pixel, with focus on conversion, accessibility and consistency.

0.solution: Different colors, fonts and components on every screen. Fragmented and amateur user experience.

1.solution: Confusing interfaces, poorly positioned CTAs and journeys that don't lead the user to the desired action.

2.solution: Analysis and development without prototypes. Constant rework because the client only sees the result after it's done.

3.solution: Sites and apps that exclude millions of users. Legal risk and market loss by not meeting WCAG standards.

4.solution: Designers and developers in silos. Components redesigned every time, with no standards or documentation.

roadmap.title: What we deliver
roadmap.subtitle: Complete design, from component system to visual identity. All documented and ready to scale.

0.title: Design System
0.description: Reusable components in Storybook with living documentation, design tokens and semantic versioning.

1.title: Prototyping
1.description: Navigable wireframes in Figma to validate flows and journeys before writing a single line of code.

2.title: UX Writing
2.description: Strategic microcopy, documented tone of voice and texts that guide the user through every step of the journey.

3.title: Accessibility
3.description: WCAG AA from wireframe stage. 4.5:1 contrast ratio, semantic labels and keyboard navigation.

4.title: Dark mode
4.description: Native implementation with smooth theme switching. Visual consistency in any preference.

5.title: Visual Identity
5.description: Palette, typography, icons and complete identity. Your brand translated to digital with consistency.

0.title: Briefing
0.description: We understand the business, target audience and conversion goals. Align expectations and deadlines.

1.title: Research
1.description: Benchmarking, competitor analysis and information architecture definition.

2.title: Prototyping
2.description: Low-fidelity wireframes evolving into navigable prototypes. Validation at every step.

3.title: Final Design
3.description: Pixel-perfect in Figma. Delivery with style guide, assets and development specifications.

cta.title: Your interface deserves real design
cta.description: Request a free analysis of your current interface. Within 48 hours we'll return improvement recommendations.

hero.title: Content &
hero.description: From editorial planning to publication. Content that educates, engages and sells — in Portuguese, English, French and Spanish.

0.solution: Content published without planning, without defined persona and without a calendar. Result: nobody reads it.

1.solution: Hiring different freelancers for each stage. Endless revisions and blown deadlines.

2.solution: Generic texts that don't educate, engage or convert. Investment with no return.

3.solution: One professional can't master research, writing, review, design and publishing all at once.

4.solution: Literal translations that lose cultural context. Rework to adapt to each market.

roadmap.title: What we deliver
roadmap.subtitle: Complete content, from strategy to publication. A multidisciplinary editorial team for each project.

0.title: Institutional E-books
0.description: From briefing to final file. Research, narrative, layout and format (PDF, ePub, Mobi).

1.title: Technical Blog
1.description: Original content with defined frequency. SEO, internal links, distribution and metrics.

2.title: Copywriting
2.description: Sales pages, landing pages, emails, CTAs and social media text that converts.

3.title: Translation & Localization
3.description: PT/EN/FR/ES by specialized translators. Cultural and technical context preserved.

4.title: KDP Publishing
4.description: Formatting, cover, Amazon SEO and launch. Sales and royalty tracking.

5.title: Editorial Strategy
5.description: Calendar, persona, keyword research and tone of voice definition. Content that educates and sells.

0.title: Strategy
0.description: We define persona, niche, keywords and editorial calendar aligned with your business goals.

1.title: Research
1.description: Gathering sources, data, references and competitor analysis. Every claim has a source.

2.title: Writing & Review
2.description: Writing by specialist, grammatical review and tone of voice alignment. Zero errors.

3.title: Publishing
3.description: Layout, formatting and publication on the chosen platform. SEO and distribution included.

cta.title: Ready to publish?
cta.description: Tell us about your editorial project. Within 24 hours we'll return a proposal with timeline and budget.

hero.title: Financial
hero.description: Trading bots, B3 integration, compliance dashboards and real-time risk. Technology serving the financial market.

0.solution: Spreadsheets, emails and daily rework. Human errors that cost dearly and consume your team's time.

1.solution: Team dedicated to repetitive tasks that could be automated. Tight margins due to inefficiency.

2.solution: Daily or weekly reports when the market moves in seconds. Outdated information is risk.

3.solution: ERPs, brokerages and banks that don't talk to each other. Data locked in incompatible silos.

4.solution: Without continuous monitoring, anomalies go unnoticed. Regulatory fines for non-compliance.

roadmap.title: What we deliver
roadmap.subtitle: Automated financial solutions, from strategy to deployment. Bots that operate 24/7 with sub-50ms latency.

0.title: Trading Bots
0.description: Buy and sell algorithms for cryptocurrencies and B3 assets. Strategies backtested with historical data.

1.title: B3 Integration
1.description: Direct connection to the Brazilian market for real-time data capture and automated execution.

2.title: Compliance Dashboards
2.description: Continuous operations monitoring, anomaly detection and regulatory report generation.

3.title: Risk Analysis
3.description: Predictive models for credit, market and liquidity risk assessment in real time.

4.title: Legacy Integration
4.description: We connect traditional financial systems with modern APIs without disrupting operations.

5.title: Automated Reports
5.description: Daily, weekly and monthly reports generated automatically. Sent by email or dashboard.

0.title: Analysis
0.description: We map your current processes and identify bottlenecks, risks and automation opportunities.

1.title: Strategy
1.description: We define the solution architecture, stacks and success metrics for each automation.

2.title: Development
2.description: Implementation of bots, integrations and dashboards with testing in a controlled environment.

3.title: Production
3.description: Monitored deployment with fallback. Continuous monitoring and performance optimization.

cta.title: Automate your financial operations
cta.description: Tell us your challenge. Within 48 hours we'll deliver a technical feasibility analysis with estimated gains.

hero.title: Radar
hero.description: Antes de invertir mucho, invierte en la validación de tu idea. Metodología exclusiva en 4 fases con score Go/No-Go. Análisis completo en 5 a 10 días hábiles.

0.solution: Thousands spent developing a product the market doesn't want. 70% of projects fail due to lack of validation.

1.solution: Products that solve the wrong problem. Features nobody uses. Pivoting too late.

2.solution: Infinite scope, unrealistic estimates and constant rework. The project never goes as planned.

3.solution: Decisions based on guesswork. No score, no data, no clear criteria to move forward or stop.

4.solution: Features requested from all sides. No method to separate the essential from the superfluous.

roadmap.title: The 4 Phases of Radar
roadmap.subtitle: Proprietary methodology that analyzes your project from 4 complementary perspectives.

0.title: ① UX & Product
0.description: Analysis of user journey, value proposition, product-market fit and competitive differentiators.

1.title: ② Technical
1.description: Architectural feasibility, tech stack, security, scalability and estimated technical debt.

2.title: ③ Market
2.description: Market size, competition, barriers to entry, acquisition channels and trends.

3.title: ④ Economic
3.description: Financial projection, estimated ROI, break-even, operational costs and revenue sources.

4.title: Consolidated Score
4.description: Score from 0 to 10 with Go/No-Go recommendation. 10-page executive report with risks and roadmap.

0.title: Briefing
0.description: We align expectations, define the scope of analysis and collect existing materials about the project.

1.title: Analysis
1.description: We apply the 4 Radar phases with specialist agents in each dimension.

2.title: Score
2.description: We consolidate results into a 0-10 score with Go, No-Go or Pivot recommendation.

3.title: Presentation
3.description: Online meeting to present the report, answer questions and define next steps.

cta.title: Validate your idea before investing
cta.description: Schedule a 30-minute conversation to present your project. No commitment.

hero.title: Audit &
hero.description: Code auditing, pentest, LGPD and compliance. We detect vulnerabilities before attackers do.

0.solution: API flaws, SQL injection, XSS and misconfigurations. Client and company data at risk.

1.solution: Leaks and non-compliance with LGPD/GDPR generate million-dollar fines and loss of market trust.

2.solution: Outdated dependencies, exposed secrets, loose permissions. One attack can stop your business.

3.solution: No asset inventory, no regular testing, no incident response. You don't know where you're vulnerable.

4.solution: Security professionals are rare and expensive. A third-party audit is faster and cheaper.

roadmap.title: What we deliver
roadmap.subtitle: Complete security audit with detailed report, evidence and remediation plan.

0.title: Code Audit
0.description: Line-by-line review of your source code. We detect OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, bad practices and security risks.

1.title: Pentest
1.description: Complete penetration testing on web applications, APIs and infrastructure. Report with evidence and recommendations.

2.title: LGPD & Compliance
2.description: Complete compliance diagnosis with the General Data Protection Law. Data mapping and process adaptation.

3.title: Security Audit
3.description: Security architecture analysis, identity management, encryption, logging and monitoring.

4.title: Security Policies
4.description: Development of information security policies, standards and procedures aligned with ISO 27001.

5.title: Incident Response
5.description: Documented response plan, scenario playbooks and attack simulations to test the team.

0.title: Scope
0.description: We define the audit perimeter: applications, infrastructure, APIs, processes and specific targets.

1.title: Analysis
1.description: We apply automated tools + manual review. Controlled penetration testing in a secure environment.

2.title: Report
2.description: Detailed document with found vulnerabilities, severity, evidence and remediation steps.

3.title: Remediation
3.description: We follow up on vulnerability fixes and perform re-testing to validate effectiveness.

cta.title: Protect your business against threats
cta.description: Request a free security diagnosis. We'll present a quick overview of the most critical vulnerabilities.

hero.title: Technical
hero.description: Architecture, code review, scope management and processes. We put your project on track with method and experience.

0.solution: Poorly defined scope, diverging stakeholders and non-existent roadmap. Everyone pulling in a different direction.

1.solution: Uncontrolled scope changes, wrong estimates and constant rework. Your money slipping away.

2.solution: Sprints that never close, unresolved dependencies and poor communication. The project never seems to advance.

3.solution: Developers accumulating management roles. Technical decisions without strategic vision. High burnout and turnover.

4.solution: Deliveries without defined quality. You can't tell if the project is on track until it's too late.

roadmap.title: What we deliver
roadmap.subtitle: Complete consulting to unblock your project. From strategy to execution, with metrics and governance.

0.title: Software Architecture
0.description: Complete architectural design with diagrams, stack definitions, patterns and documented technical decisions.

1.title: Scope Management
1.description: Methodology for change control. Scope becomes a contract, changes become orders with cost and timeline.

2.title: Code Review
2.description: Technical analysis of existing code: quality, performance, security and technical debt with improvement plan.

3.title: Project Planning
3.description: Roadmap, sprints, milestones and dependencies. From MVP to next steps with realistic estimates.

4.title: Process Optimization
4.description: Analysis of current workflow and recommendations to eliminate bottlenecks and accelerate deliveries.

5.title: Metrics & OKRs
5.description: Project and product KPIs. Goal definition, weekly tracking and executive reports.

0.title: Diagnosis
0.description: We analyze the current scenario: processes, team, code, deadlines and project pain points.

1.title: Action Plan
1.description: Recommendations prioritized by impact and effort. Short, medium and long-term roadmap.

2.title: Execution
2.description: Implementation of recommendations with continuous monitoring and course adjustments.

3.title: Handover
3.description: Team training, final documentation and autonomy to maintain the pace without external dependency.

cta.title: Put your project on track
cta.description: Schedule a free 30-minute diagnosis. We'll present an X-ray of your project with initial recommendations.

local.title: 📍 Natal — RN
local.description: We serve all of Brazil remotely with the agility and closeness of someone right next door.

horario.title: ⏱️ Response hours
horario.description: Monday to Friday, 8am to 6pm. We respond within 24 business hours.

1.title: 1. Who we are
1.p1: Dibs Solutions is a technology agency based in Natal — RN, Brazil. Our institutional website presents our services and captures contacts from potential clients to respond to quote and partnership requests.

2.title: 2. Data we collect
2.p1: We exclusively collect data voluntarily provided by you through the contact form:
2.p2: We do not collect sensitive data (racial origin, religious belief, health, biometric data, etc.). We do not collect data from minors.
2.p3: Legal basis: Your explicit consent (Art. 7, I of LGPD) by checking the checkbox on the contact form.

3.title: 3. Cookies
3.p1: We use essential cookies for the website's operation. No tracking, advertising or third-party cookies are used.
items: theme — Stores your theme preference (light/dark). Duration: 1 year.
cookie-consent — Records your choice regarding the cookie notice. Duration: 1 year.
3.p3: You may refuse non-essential cookies and manage preferences at any time in your browser settings. At any time you may revoke your consent by contacting us.

4.title: 4. Purpose of processing
4.p1: Your data is used exclusively for:
items: Responding to your contact and quote request
Sending information about the service you are interested in
4.p2: We do not use your data for unsolicited marketing. We do not perform automated decisions based on your data (profiling).

5.title: 5. Data sharing
5.p1: We do not share your data with third parties. Your data is accessible only by the controller (Rafael Mendonça) and, when necessary, by Dibs Solutions' AI agents who exclusively work on responding to your contact.
5.p2: We do not transfer data internationally. All data remains within Brazilian territory.
5.p3: We do not sell your data under any circumstances.

6.title: 6. Storage and retention
6.p1: Your data is stored in a password-protected email account with two-factor authentication and in a local spreadsheet in a secure environment. We retain your data for the period necessary to fulfill your request and for up to 12 months after the last contact for commercial record purposes.
6.p2: After this period, data is permanently deleted or anonymized.

7.title: 7. Your rights (LGPD — Law 13.709/2018)
items: Confirmation and access — Know whether we process your data and access it
Correction — Request correction of incomplete or outdated data
Deletion — Request deletion of your data at any time
Portability — Request transfer of data to another provider
Consent withdrawal — Withdraw your consent at any time
Opposition — Object to processing for specific purposes
Information — Know about data sharing and the purpose of data use
7.p2: To exercise any of these rights, contact: rafael@dibs.solutions. We will respond within 15 business days as provided by LGPD.

8.title: 8. Security
8.p1: We adopt technical and organizational security measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, destruction, loss or alteration:
items: Restricted data access only to the controller
Periodic data backup in an isolated environment

9.title: 9. Changes to this policy
9.p1: This policy may be updated periodically. We recommend reviewing it on each visit. Significant changes will be communicated through a notice on the website. Version history is available upon request.

10.title: 10. Contact the officer (DPO)
10.p1: For data protection-related questions, contact our officer:
10.name: Rafael Mendonça

cookieConsent.text: We use essential cookies for the website's operation. No tracking or advertising cookies are used.

0.quote: Dibs transformó mi idea en un e-book completo en solo 5 días. La calidad del diseño y la redacción superaron mis expectativas.

1.quote: Necesitaba un juego simple y divertido para entretener a mis clientes mientras esperan. Dibs entregó un snake completo con fases, power-ups y ranking en tiempo récord.

2.quote: Dibs automatizó mi estrategia de trading con resultados financieros reales. La precisión de los bots y la transparencia de los análisis me dieron confianza para operar en el mercado.

3.quote: Conocimos el trabajo de Dibs antes de que la agencia existiera. El sitio que hicieron para Top5Trades fue profesional y entregado a tiempo — ahora lo reharemos con la nueva estructura.
3.name: Top5Trades
3.tags: proyecto anterior • reconstruyendo con nueva identidad
